warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Article gender and adjective endings: practice the three genders (der/die/das) with their accusative forms (den/die/das), focusing on common café and food nouns like 'das Frühstück', 'die Melange', 'der Kaffee' — use flashcards with the article always included.
speaking_prompt: It's lunchtime. Order a full small meal from the Tageskarte (daily menu). Ask what the soup of the day is, then order a main and a drink.
